lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on the interior and exterior and may require some mechanical attention. It is in running condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear or cosmetic damage. Both the exterior and interior are in like-new condition.

Get ready to hit the road in a vehicle that offers great value and dependable performance! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest character from its time on the road, but it remains a functional and reliable choice for your daily needs. It’s a fantastic opportunity to own a capable vehicle at a price that makes sense!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for those who prioritize function over aesthetics. It starts and runs reliably, though the transmission can be a bit hesitant when shifting into reverse. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scuffs on the bumpers, a small dent on the driver-side rear door, and some fading of the paint on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows significant wear on the driver's seat bolster and some minor electrical quirks, such as a temperamental power window on the passenger side. While it has been maintained well enough to stay on the road, it will likely need new brake pads and tires in the near future. This is a solid, honest car that is ready for daily use but would benefit from some cosmetic and minor mechanical attention.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for a daily commuter. The exterior shows expected signs of use, including several noticeable scratches on the passenger side and minor paint fading on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows some staining on the rear seats. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are solid, though the air conditioning takes a moment to cool down and the tires will likely need replacing within the next year. It is a functional, honest car that is priced according to its current state.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced combination of performance and value. It has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and long-term reliability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and she's looking for a brand new home. It’s been a super reliable ride and is still in really great shape—perfect for anyone who wants a solid, dependable vehicle that’s been well-loved. I’ve kept it nice and tidy, so it’s ready to hit the road with you today. Come take it for a spin and see how smoothly it drives!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Runs smoothly. Clean title.

This vehicle has been exceptionally well-maintained and presents a wonderful balance of performance and comfort. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting; the leather seats show light bolstering wear but remain free of any tears or punctures, and the dashboard is pristine with all electronic components, including the navigation and climate control, functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health with a documented service history, recently replaced brake pads, and tires that offer significant tread life. It handles with precision and the engine pulls smoothly through every gear. This is a reliable, turnkey example that has been kept in a smoke-free, pet-free environment and is ready for its next owner.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and refined aesthetics. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. This is an investment in quality and enduring automotive excellence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure sustained performance and reliability. We invite you to experience the superior engineering and balanced value this exceptional automobile provides.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a reliable ride that’s ready to hit the road. It runs great and I've taken good care of it, so it's all set for its next big adventure with you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great new home!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. Power is managed via a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. The chassis has been enhanced with proactive rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein dampers. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive valve clearance adjustment. The car exhibits a strong power band and exceptional turn-in response, presenting a mechanically sound and well-sorted driver’s car.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that perfectly bridges the gap between everyday utility and refined performance. The exterior finish is vibrant, showing only the lightest signs of road wear, while the body panels remain straight and true. Inside, the interior smells fresh and clean, with supple upholstery and a dashboard that remains free of cracks or fading. Every button, switch, and dial operates with tactile precision,

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved over the years. Whether you’re just commuting to work or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car is totally ready for its next adventure with you. It runs smoothly and still looks great—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering a mechanically sound E92 M3, powered by the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This chassis remains exceptionally balanced, utilizing an M Variable Differential Lock and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for precise lateral dynamics. The 7-speed M-DCT provides lightning-fast shifts, while the subframes and bushings remain tight, preserving the car's legendary communicative steering. Recent preventive maintenance includes rod bearing inspection and throttle actuator replacement. This example presents in well-maintained condition, striking the perfect balance between a visceral performance machine and a reliable weekend tourer.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Maintenance up to date.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, honest signs of road use one would expect from a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery has been regularly conditioned and remains supple, while every button and feature functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule and a documented service history. It starts promptly, idles smoothly, and delivers a composed, confident ride whether you're navigating city streets or cruising the highway. Recent updates include a fresh oil service and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for immediate enjoyment. This is a reliable, high-quality example that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. It serves as an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking dependable performance and a sophisticated presence on the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Fully inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards, this offering provides an exceptional ownership experience at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in great condition, ready for many more adventures. It runs beautifully and has been super well-loved. You’re going to absolutely love how it handles on the road—it's perfect for your next road trip or daily commute!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 inline-six power plant with factory individual throttle bodies. This example exhibits strong compression and linear power delivery through its Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with upgraded bushings and a reinforced rear subframe to address common floor-pan fatigue. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and valve clearance adjustment. Equipped with a limited-slip differential and staggered 19-inch Style 67 alloys, this vehicle offers the quintessential analog driving experience. The exterior finish and interior bolsters are well-preserved, reflecting a history of attentive mechanical care.
Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. No accidents.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability, offering a premium driving experience. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only minor, superficial signs of careful road use consistent with its history. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin with supple leather seating that remains firm and supportive, complemented by clean carpets and well-preserved trim. Every electronic feature, from the multi-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine operates smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of consistent oil changes and preventative service. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, comfortable ride. With ample tread on the tires and responsive brakes, this car is fully prepared for the road ahead, offering its next owner a dependable and sophisticated ride.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers dependable performance and exceptional value.
